constraints.trainingRun: CPU-only oracle observability ceiling and selector search

splitDefinition.method: Stable Fisher-Yates shuffle over scenario indices using Mulberry32 seed 0xc0def00d.

evaluationDesign.causalHistory: referencePoll rows with elapsedMicroseconds <= anchor elapsedMicroseconds
evaluationDesign.label: interpolated referencePoll at anchor + horizon

candidateList.description: Product-eligible lower-bound selector: always choose the train-best base predictor.
Product-eligible selector using requested horizon only.
Small tree: horizon root, then train-best causal stump.
Ridge-like linear error score per base predictor; choose lowest predicted error.
Nearest-prototype selector trained from oracle-best regions in causal feature space.
Analysis-only direct label oracle choosing the lowest-error base predictor per sample.
Analysis-only selector using script/evaluation movement category and horizon.

zeroErrorFeasibility: Current candidate diversity has real headroom: oracle best-of reaches normal p95 3.5px / p99 13.5px and stress p95 4px / p99 12.75px, but this oracle uses the label. Product-eligible causal selectors do not close that gap. Resume-tail nearest-neighbor collisions show close causal histories with future divergence >10px at rate 0.0768 and oracle-best mismatch rate 0.5264. Near-zero error is therefore not plausible from the current inputs alone; larger models may overfit selectors unless the runtime records transition/timing telemetry that makes those collisions separable.
nextStepRecommendation: Step 8 should prioritize instrumentation over larger model search: add explicit prediction target/present timestamps, hold/resume transition age, warm-up/missing scheduler markers, and scheduler provenance to MotionLab/TraceTool, then rerun Steps 3-7 with those causal fields.
